quote.text: UNIX is simple.  It just takes a genius to understand its simplicity
quote.author: Dennis Ritchie
quote.authorTitle: Computer scientist and inventor of the C language

links.title: GitHub CLI 1.0
links.description: GitHub CLI brings GitHub to your terminal. It reduces context switching, helps you focus, and enables you to more easily script and create your own workflows.

links.title: OAuth in Node.js CLI Apps
links.description: OAuth is a popular tool for logging in to web apps, but Node makes it easy to use OAuth for CLI apps too. Here's how you can add OAuth support to a Slack CLI app.

links.title: Free svg background generator
links.description: Free svg background generator for your websites, blogs and app.

links.title: alixaxel/chrome-aws-lambda
links.description: Chromium Binary for AWS Lambda and Google Cloud Functions. A great library to easily run Puppeteer in serverless environments.

links.title: Mono Icons
links.description: A free, consistent, open-source icon set designed to be used in a wide variety of digital products.

links.title: Migrating from styled-components to Stitches
links.description: Stitches in a new CSS-in-JS library. In this article, you will learn what are the main differences with styled-components and how to migrate an existing project to stitches.

links.title: ReadSpecWith.us
links.description: Read the ECMAScript Specification and understand what it means with code examples!

book.title: Agile Web Development with Rails 5
book.author: Sam Ruby
book.description: Rails 5 and Ruby 2.2 bring many improvements, including new APIs and substantial performance enhancements, and the fifth edition of this award-winning classic is now updated! If you're new to Rails, you'll get step-by-step guidance. If you're an experienced developer, this book will give you the comprehensive, insider information you need for the latest version of Ruby on Rails.
